title: lachryma-jobi
intro: Lachryma-jobi, also known as the tears plant, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Gynura, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Lachryma-jobi include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestion, and even alleviate menopausal symptoms. The herbal preparations of Lachryma-jobi include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
